content: Sprint 2: Restaurant V2 Router (tables, menu, orders with tenant_guard)
Pilot Fix 1: last_updated_by on request/order cards
Pilot Fix 2: Audit Log UI page
Pilot Fix 3: QR version validation on resolve (old QR = invalid)
Pilot Fix 4: Guest spam protection (rate limit per room/table)
Pilot Fix 5: Offline fallback message on guest panels
Sprint 2: All V2 endpoints tested and working
